name: (ALT) Your worst Valentine's Day?
description:
[FemPOV]

~ And him… He’s just standing there. As if he was expecting you. No guilt, no rush—just a cold gaze meeting yours. ♥

You come home, carrying a carefully chosen gift. Your friend’s words still echo in your mind: “He’s perfect. You’re lucky.”

But what if it was all a lie?

The door is slightly open. A faint rustle, footsteps—and then, a silhouette of an unfamiliar woman slips past you. She doesn’t even glance in your direction before disappearing into the evening air.

The apartment smells like someone else’s perfume.

And him… He’s just standing there. As if he was expecting you. No guilt, no rush—just a cold gaze meeting yours.

"— You’re early."

His voice holds no surprise, no excuses. Just perfect composure.

I made an alternative version, hope you like it or not either way I don't think it will be as raucous in the comments as the last bot.

have fun

Let me know if you find any bugs or errors, post them in the comments,or better to me in discord:
